name: cc-installer
description: 一键安装 Claude Code 的跨平台桌面工具

scripts.dev: tsc && mkdir -p dist/renderer/steps && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/app.js dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/steps/*.js dist/renderer/steps/ && electron .
scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/renderer/steps && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/style.css dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/app.js dist/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/steps/*.js dist/renderer/steps/ && electron-builder
